microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **enterprise resilience** validation program from a 2-person operation into a platformized solution, standardizing deployment workflows to sustain 45+ annual drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Served as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, directing 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility and coordinating across ML, infrastructure, and GTM stakeholders to ensure on-time delivery.

Extracted repeatable patterns from customer deployment engagements to inform product packaging, identifying universal failure modes across enterprise verticals and translating findings into **productized playbooks** that reduced implementation overhead for new customer onboarding.

Built an internal **AI agent** for drill planning and restructured scheduling workflows using LLM-powered automation, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Partnered with ML and inference teams to define tooling requirements that collapsed implementation overhead across sovereign and commercial deployments, directly enabling scalable outbound sales motions around **repeatable AI solutions**.

Improved **AI-powered semantic search** fidelity and deployment speed by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation infrastructure, cutting customer lookup time by 83% and reducing implementation overhead for downstream teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, coordinating product strategy across 140+ enterprise service teams with competing roadmap priorities.

Defined a product strategy to eliminate implementation overhead during region launches — conducting **customer discovery** with 20+ service teams, quantifying 81 hours of manual toil per region, and building a roadmap to automate critical deployment paths at enterprise scale.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to surface operational toil patterns across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-impact investment, and make data-driven packaging decisions for the region launch solution.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **prioritizing the backlog** to resolve 40+ high-priority tickets and stabilize the developer intake process, reducing implementation friction for engineering teams across the robotics platform.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable release motion that reduced manual overhead for each subsequent rollout.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by owning end-to-end customer engagement operations — redesigning the scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a new CRM process that standardized workflows and improved conversion at each funnel stage.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile to target the highest-value customer segments with measurable channel-level tracking.
